scientific_question: Program O's product-mix mechanism -- the only decision variable with confirmed observable adaptive value on canonical ReT -- was established with risks_enabled=False (demand-regime uncertainty only). Does that adaptive value survive, grow, or die when the thesis's OWN operational risks relevant to the mechanism's operations are activated and escalated, Garrido-style (only relevant risks on)?
method_lineage: Garrido thesis section 6.4/6.7: activate only the risks relevant to the operations under study, one-factor-at-a-time frequency escalation. This contract applies his own method to the one mechanism his construct rewards.

closed_records_untouched: STOP_PROGRAM_O_AFTER_CORRECTIVE_VALIDATION (risks-off validation; its no_post_failure_rescue list, which includes risk addition, applies to THAT contract's claim)
garrido risk screen (constant-posture tailoring null -- different estimand: posture invariance, not mix-mechanism robustness)
not_a_rescue.claim_here: DEVELOPMENT robustness/generalization map only. No promotion, no learner, no sealed tapes, no Paper 2 claim. Outputs feed (a) the manuscript's robustness section and (b) cell selection for any future adjudicated learner contract.

relevant_risk_map.mechanism_operations: mix decision executes on the shared Op5-Op7 assembly line; product flows Op8-Op12; demand at Op13

included.R11: workstation breakdowns -- hits Op5/Op6 (thesis Table 6.6b: U(1,168) occurrence, exp(beta=2h) repair)
included.R14: quality problems -- hits Op7 (Binomial n=2564 p=3/100, reprocess)
included.R21: natural disasters -- hits Op3,Op5,Op6,Op7,Op9 simultaneously (U(1,16128), exp(beta=120h))
included.R24: contingent demand -- hits Op13 (U(1,672), 2400-2600 rations/672h, priority over regular)

excluded_with_reason.R12_R13: contracting/supplier risks hit Op1/Op2, upstream of and symmetric to the mix decision
excluded_with_reason.R23: forward-unit destruction hits Op11 downstream of the mix, symmetric across products (PT=0 pass-through); effect on the MIX decision expected nil -- excluded, disclosed
excluded_with_reason.R3: black swan FROZEN per standing program rule; untouched

configuration_grid_frozen.baseline: risks_enabled=False (identity anchor: must reproduce the corrective-validation development numbers bit-consistently)
configuration_grid_frozen.thesis_current: all five included risks ON at thesis-current frequency/impact (phi=psi=1)
configuration_grid_frozen.one_at_a_time_phi: each included risk alone at phi in {1, 2, 4}, psi=1, others OFF (Garrido one-factor design) -> 15 configs
configuration_grid_frozen.combined_relevant: all five ON at phi=2, psi=1 (the concomitant profile, Cf-style)
configuration_grid_frozen.no_posthoc_extension: no config, level, or risk may be added after this freeze

evaluation.environment: full DES Program O physics (fixed_clock_physical), risks per config; NO transducer (its parity certificate covers risks-off physics only)
evaluation.tapes: 12 BURNED development tapes per config (7420001-7420012 series, already opened in the fit stage); CRN: identical demand-mix and risk event tapes across policies within a config
policies_per_config: frozen belief-MPC (rho90_share90 configuration, byte-identical to the corrective validation's controller, NO retuning)
restricted periodic calendar family (period 1-4 over k, deduped, ~40 sequences)
evaluation.primary_estimand: H_dev(config) = mean ret_excel_request_snapshot_v2 of frozen belief-MPC minus best-in-config restricted comparator, paired per tape
evaluation.comparator_bias_disclosure: the comparator is RESTRICTED (not the 65,536 frontier) -> H_dev is biased UPWARD. Screening asymmetry frozen: a config where H_dev <= 0 is dead A FORTIORI (the full frontier is stronger); a config where H_dev > 0 is a HYPOTHESIS only and can never be promoted from this screen. Any future confirmation pays the full frontier on fresh sealed tapes under its own contract.
secondary_panels: H_PI_dev (per-tape clairvoyant best over the restricted family, report-only)
physical ReT level per config (does escalation hurt resilience as in the thesis H1 direction?)
ret_visible_cvar10 REPORTED (never a gate -- PI directive: if informative, good addition; if not, nothing lost)
anti-shed guardrails (worst-product fill, lost orders, attended) reported
risk-event fixture: per-config event counts per operation MUST be populated and match the relevant-risk map (a risk that never fires or fires on unmapped ops voids the config)

compute_envelope: 18 configs x 12 tapes x ~45 policy-sequences ~= 9,720 full-DES episodes; at 1-5 s/episode ~= 3-14 h on the local 10-core pool. No caps touched, no cluster, no 747/748 seeds, no sealed tapes.

gates_in_order.G0_identity: baseline config reproduces the risks-off development H of the frozen controller within CI (environment identity; fail -> STOP_ENV_MISMATCH, nothing else runs)

gates_in_order.G1_risk_fixture: every included risk fires on exactly its mapped operations with plausible thesis-rate counts at phi=1; R3 event count = 0 everywhere

gates_in_order.G2_map: produce the full 18-config map with every cell reported (no silent drops)

outcomes_precommitted.value_survives_or_grows: robustness section for the manuscript + candidate risk cells for the future adjudicated learner contract (cell selection rule: least-severe surviving cells first, never max-H)
outcomes_precommitted.value_dies_under_risk: honest scope boundary for the paper: the confirmed conversion is a calm-environment result; recorded in the certificate as a disclosed limitation
outcomes_precommitted.either_way: no rescue, no promotion, no learner authorization from this screen

implementation_split.independent_verifier: concurrent auditor process (verifies G0 identity + risk fixture BEFORE the map is read; verifies frozen-controller byte-identity)
